extName.description: Extension name shown in the Chrome Web Store and browser

extDescription.message: Download YouTube videos in one click. Choose quality from 360p to 1080p or audio-only MP3. Fast, free, no ads.
extDescription.description: Extension description for the Chrome Web Store

extTitle.description: Tooltip shown when hovering the extension icon

errorNotYouTube.message: Open a YouTube video to download it.
errorNotYouTube.description: Error message when the user is not on a YouTube video page

tabVideo.description: Tab label for combined video+audio formats

youtubeVideo.description: Fallback title when video data is not available

cobaltFallbackTitle.description: Title shown when using Cobalt as the extraction method

orDownloadViaCobalt.description: Separator text for Cobalt download options

videoAndAudio.description: Format meta label for combined streams

videoOnly.description: Format meta label for video-only streams

audioLabel.description: Format meta label for audio-only streams

audioMp3.description: Label for audio MP3 format option

liveStream.description: Label for live streams with no duration
